description_long: This is an electric guitar with a striking, modern design featuring a deep blue to black gradient finish on its contoured body. The body has aggressive, sharp cutaways and sculpted horns, giving it a bold, edgy appearance typical of heavy metal or hard rock instruments. The neck is long and slender, with a dark fretboard and six visible tuning pegs on the headstock, which is pointed and slightly angled. The bridge, pickups, and control knobs are visible on the front, all finished in dark tones that complement the body color. The back of the guitar is solid and unadorned, with the same dark finish, and the side views reveal the instrument's slim profile. This guitar is likely constructed from solid wood with metal hardware and plastic components for the knobs and pickups.
description: A modern electric guitar with a blue-black gradient finish, sharp cutaways, and a pointed headstock, designed for rock or metal genres. It features a contoured body, dark hardware, and six strings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue-black gradient body, sharp cutaways, pickups, bridge, control knobs, and the pointed headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the angled headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned back of the guitar with the same dark finish and the full length of the neck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the body and neck, as well as the hardware protruding slightly from the body.
attribute_headstock_design: Pointed headstock with inline six tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a sharp, modern contour.
